name: Hoarder
description: Common Vladof class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker, centred on Lay Waste, 5 Shots or 6, and Filled to the Brim. Restores ammo for the equipped weapon directly to reserves.
notes: Hoarder class mods only restore ammunition for your currently equipped weapon, adding it straight to your ammo reserves. They do not regenerate grenades or rocket ammo.
